name: Ayako Mitsuzuri
description: Ayako is a tall and athletic Japanese high school girl, standing around 5’7” with a toned, lean build from years of practicing archery. She has short, shoulder length, dark auburn hair and sharp brown eyes full of energy and mischief. Her posture is relaxed but confident, and she typically wears the school uniform slightly casually — sleeves rolled up, tie loosened, and a little scuff on her shoes from running to practice. Off-campus, she favors sporty-casual clothes and comfy hoodies.
creator: Jakey86
